name: detect-ai
description: Analyze text to detect if it was written by AI. Returns a score from 0-100 with detailed metrics. Use when checking content before publishing or submitting.
capabilities: Analyze text and return AI detection score from 0-100
Provide detailed metrics including perplexity, burstiness, readability, and n-gram scores
Present results in clear, actionable format with recommendations
Interpret scores with context (human-written, likely AI, highly likely AI)
Handle API errors and suggest troubleshooting steps
Support for WebFetch tool to make API calls
author: humanizerai
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged multiple patterns but evaluation reveals false positives. The detected 'external_commands' are markdown code blocks, not shell execution. The 'network' and 'env_access' findings are legitimate API calling patterns - the skill makes expected HTTP requests to humanizerai.com with an API key for authentication. No actual security risks identified.
valueStatement: This skill analyzes text to detect if it was written by AI, returning a score from 0-100 with detailed metrics. Use it to verify content authenticity before publishing or submitting.
limitations: Depends on external HumanizerAI API service availability
May not detect heavily edited AI-generated content
Score interpretation is probabilistic, not definitive proof

useCases.title: Content Verification for Publishers
useCases.description: Publishers use this skill to verify submitted articles are original and not AI-generated, ensuring content quality standards.

useCases.title: Academic Integrity Checking
useCases.description: Educators and institutions use this skill to check student submissions for AI-generated work.

useCases.targetUser: Freelance writers, content creators, marketing professionals
useCases.title: Pre-Submission Quality Check
useCases.description: Writers use this skill to check their own content before submitting to ensure it does not appear AI-generated.

promptTemplates.title: Basic AI Detection
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick check of a single piece of text

promptTemplates.title: Analysis with Context
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the detect-ai skill to analyze the following text and explain what the different metrics mean: [text content]
promptTemplates.scenario: When you want explanation of the metrics

promptTemplates.title: Batch Content Check
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this article段落 for AI-generated content: [paste article]. Give me a summary of the verdict and key metrics.

promptTemplates.title: Recommendation Request
promptTemplates.prompt: /detect-ai [text]. Based on the score, should I use the HumanizerAI tool to humanize this content before publishing?

bestPractices: Use the score.overall value (not 'score') when presenting results to users
Provide context by explaining what each metric means (perplexity, burstiness, readability)
Always include actionable recommendations based on the score range
antiPatterns: Displaying the raw JSON response directly to users without interpretation
Ignoring API errors and not providing helpful troubleshooting
Treating the score as definitive proof rather than a probability indicator

faq.question: What does the AI detection score mean?
faq.answer: The score ranges from 0-100. Lower scores (0-40) indicate human-written content, middle scores (41-60) are uncertain, and higher scores (61-100) indicate AI-generated content.

faq.question: What API key do I need?
faq.answer: You need a HUMANIZERAI_API_KEY from https://humanizerai.com. Set it in your environment variables before using the skill.

faq.question: Can this skill guarantee if content is AI-written?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides a probability estimate based on linguistic patterns. It is not definitive proof of AI generation.

faq.question: What are the key metrics shown?
faq.answer: The main metrics are perplexity (language model uncertainty), burstiness (variation in sentence length), readability (text complexity), and n-gram score (pattern analysis).

faq.question: What if the API call fails?
faq.answer: Check that HUMANIZERAI_API_KEY is set correctly. Verify the API service is available. The skill provides error messages for debugging.

faq.question: Can this detect edited AI content?
faq.answer: Detection accuracy decreases for heavily edited AI content. The skill may show lower scores for humanized text.
